title: AI trading app
author: Intelligent_Goat_91
selftext: I’ve been on an app which is using AI for buying crypto between different platforms.It searches and buys low then sells a little higher. Half profit is yours half is theirs. Even 100€/$ is enough to start.Im using the app for 14 days and I made some ok money.If anyone is interested I can send the invite link for the app.Oh the app is called TOST.Its been running since 2018!Seems legit with no complains till today

comments.author: Brave_Measurement_70
comments.body: Are u able to share the invitation code

comments.author: Fit-Bed-5242
comments.body: Join here  https://ctostapp.xyz/?tid=GO4L4R  We are making a big group and its worth trying it out . Obviously not a scam kr something. You get your money back in a month or so . You can withdraw it when you have your money back and then continue without having any stress of losing money.
